chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 43 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case For hearing of MA No.711/2023 (R/Surety) 23.08.2023 None present for applicant. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Through instant application, applicant namely Shah Nawaz S/o Shahzado seeks return of surety furnished by him before Additional Registrar of this Court. It appears that this Court vide order dated 21.06.2023 granted protective bail to accused Fateh Muhammad S/o Khair Muhammad Jafferi till 4th July 2023 in Crime No.05 of 2023 of Police Station Golo Daro, District Shikarpur, and later on, the applicant stood surety on behalf of said accused by submitting original Special Savings Certificate bearing No. HE-971698 amounting to Rs.50,000/- (Rupees fifty thousand) issued by National Savings Centre-I, Sukkur vide registration No.62128 dated 21.06.2023. Subsequently, the aforesaid accused surrendered before the concerned trial Court (Learned Special Judge, Anti-Terrorism Court, Shikarpur), from where he has obtained interim pre-arrest bail vide order dated 04.07.2023 passed in Cr. Bail Appl. No.26 of 2023. Photocopy of such order has been placed on record by the applicant. Learned Additional P. G. concedes to the above facts and extends his no objection to grant of this application on the ground that the accused has surrendered before the concerned trial Court within stipulated period. The report of Accountant of this Court reflects that aforesaid surety is still lying in the office of this Court. In view of above, the listed application is allowed.

The report of Accountant of this Court reflects that aforesaid surety is still lying in the office of this Court. In view of above, the listed application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety i.e. aforesaid original Special Savings Certificate to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
